package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for runtime_numcpu_inside_loop: `runtime.NumCPU()` inside loops instead of caching once.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario634Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
